creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
As per mat@'s comment[1]:

> OPTIONS_DEFAULT= DOCS
>> This is not required, DOCS is always added to OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

It would be nice if portlint complained about adding DOCS to OPTIONS_DEFAULT.

[1]: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D16339#366424

----

(Although personally I'd prefer all the OPTIONS_DEFAULT to be explicitly listed. I'm not sure if I'm a fan of DOCS (and potentially others) being always added to OPTIONS_DEFAULT by default. I find it non-intuitive.)
